result:
Clean build, no errors or warnings related to the change, and `redis-server`/`redis-cli`/`redis-benchmark` linked successfully.

Summary of changes:
- `src/db.c:384` — renamed to `kvobj *lookupKeyReadOrReplyEx(robj *key, client *c, robj *reply)`, same body/behavior, `key` param now first.
- `src/server.h:4054` — declaration updated to match.
- All 34 call sites across `bitops.c`, `geo.c`, `t_hash.c`, `t_string.c`, `t_list.c`, `t_set.c`, `t_array.c`, `t_zset.c`, `t_stream.c` migrated to `lookupKeyReadOrReplyEx(key, c, reply)`.
- No remaining references to the old name anywhere in the repo. `make` builds fully green.
